scripts.build:dotnet: rm -rf ./dist/dotnet && dotnet publish ./dotnet/excel-converter/ExcelConverter.csproj -c Release && mkdir -p ./dist/dotnet && publish_dir=$(find ./dotnet/excel-converter/bin/Release -type d -path '*/publish' | head -n 1) && test -n "$publish_dir" && cp -R "$publish_dir"/. ./dist/dotnet/
